item.title: 科尔士百货预测年度销售额跌幅将超预期
item.description: 科尔士百货周二预测全年销售额将出现超预期下滑，因精打细算的消费者在其百货商店减少了对服装和家居用品等高利润商品的消费，导致其股价盘前下跌约8%。【原文：Kohl's on Tuesday ‌forecast a steeper annual sales drop than expected, as budget-conscious shoppers ​pull back spending ​on higher-margin items including ⁠apparel and homegoods at ​its department stores, sending its ​shares down about 8% premarket.】

item.title: 酱料香料制造商引发收购热潮，GLP-1药物推动美国人追捧辛辣食品
item.description: 美国对减肥的痴迷正为调味品和香料制造商创造一个火热的市场，随着GLP-1药物使用量的激增，消费者渴望在食物中获得更多风味。【原文：America's obsession with weight loss is creating a hot market for ​makers of condiments and spices, as the surge in GLP-1 drug use has consumers craving more flavor ‌in their food.】

item.title: 晨间竞价：原油的易燃平静
item.description: 当今美国及全球市场中真正重要的因素【原文：What matters in U.S. and global markets today】

item.title: 桌游公司即将登陆英国私募股权市场
item.description: 一家桌游开发商即将成为本月晚些时候在英国新私募股票市场上市的首家企业，该交易将在伦敦证券交易所运营平台的竞争对手平台上进行。【原文：A board games developer is set to become the first company to list its shares on Britain's new private ​stock market later this month, in a deal that will ‌take place on a rival platform to that operated by the London Stock Exchange.】

item.title: 亚马逊将国防工作负载迁移至其他平台，保留Claude服务于其他领域
item.description: 亚马逊公司发言人周二表示，AWS正协助客户将战争部的工作负载从Anthropic技术迁移至其云平台上的替代模型。【原文：AWS is ​helping customers ‌transition Department of ​War ​workloads off Anthropic ⁠technology ​to alternative ​models on its cloud, ​an ​Amazon spokesperson said ‌on ⁠Tuesday.】

item.title: 消息人士称，贝恩资本即将完成创纪录的105亿美元亚洲基金最终关闭
item.description: 知情人士周二透露，贝恩资本第六期泛亚私募股权基金已筹集约105亿美元资金，即将完成募资。该金额远超其70亿美元的募资目标。【原文：Bain Capital is close to ​wrapping up fundraising for its ‌sixth pan-Asia private equity fund after raising about $10.5 billion, two ​people with knowledge of ​the matter said Tuesday, well ⁠exceeding its $7 billion target.】

item.title: 比尔·阿克曼申请为珀欣广场及新基金进行双重首次公开募股
item.description: 亿万富翁投资者比尔·阿克曼旗下的潘兴广场基金周二提交了其对冲基金及新基金的美国首次公开募股申请，有望加入公开上市另类资产管理公司的少数群体。【原文：Billionaire investor Bill Ackman's Pershing Square filed for U.S. initial public offerings of his ​hedge fund and a new fund on Tuesday, ‌looking set to join a small club of publicly traded alternative asset managers.】

item.title: 中国寄望于全社会推进人工智能发展，以创造就业岗位、振兴经济
item.description: 中国政策制定者和企业高管表示，中国在人工智能领域的加速布局将催生新岗位，推动世界第二大经济体发展。他们同时淡化了全球日益增长的担忧——即该技术可能抑制就业增长。【原文：China's scramble to adopt artificial intelligence will spawn new jobs and propel the world's second largest economy, say policymakers and company executives, as they play down growing global ​fears that the technology could stunt employment.】

item.title: 华尔街期货因中东冲突有望早日结束而上涨
item.description: 周二美国股指期货小幅上扬，因投资者期待中东冲突能更快解决。此前特朗普总统就该战争发表评论后，能源价格飙升并加剧了通胀担忧。【原文：U.S. stock index futures ticked up on Tuesday, ​as investors hoped for a quicker resolution to the Middle East conflict that has led to ‌a spike in energy prices and stoked inflation concerns, following President Donald Trump's comments on the war.】

item.title: 美国电话电报公司将在五年内向美国投资2500亿美元以提升基础设施建设
item.description: 美国电话电报公司（AT&T）周二宣布，计划未来五年在美国投资超过2500亿美元，用于扩建其网络基础设施。【原文：AT&T plans ‌to invest more than $250 billion over ﬁve ​years in ​the U.S. to build ⁠out its network ​infrastructure, the telecom ​services provider said on Tuesday.】

item.title: 埃克森美孚拟放弃新泽西州注册地位，重返德克萨斯州
item.description: 美国石油巨头埃克森美孚周二宣布，正寻求撤销在新泽西州的公司注册，转而在总部所在地得克萨斯州重新注册。此举或有助于增强其抵御激进股东和气候倡导者的能力。【原文：Exxon Mobil is seeking to abandon its corporate registration in New Jersey and reincorporate ‌in Texas where its headquarters is located, the U.S. oil major said on Tuesday, in a move that could help bolster its defenses against activist shareholders and climate advocates.】

item.title: 独家：马斯克旗下SpaceX考虑在纳斯达克上市，此前曾寻求提前纳入指数
item.description: 据四位知情人士透露，埃隆·马斯克旗下的火箭与卫星制造商SpaceX正倾向于在纳斯达克上市，此次首次公开募股（IPO）规模可能创下历史之最。【原文：Elon Musk's rocket and satellite maker SpaceX is leaning toward listing its shares on the Nasdaq ​for what could rank as the biggest initial public offering of all time, according to four people familiar with the company's ‌thinking.】

item.title: 马克龙称法国将利用核能为人工智能数据中心供电
item.description: 法国总统马克龙周二表示，凭借其庞大的能源出口，法国将能够开设数据中心并满足人工智能的需求。【原文：France will be able to ​open data centres and ‌meet the needs of artificial intelligence thanks ​to its large ​energy exports, French President ⁠Emmanuel Macron said on ​Tuesday.】

item.title: 日本计划到2040年实现国产芯片销售额增长五倍
item.description: 日本周二在首相高市早苗的增长投资战略框架下，设定新目标：到2040年将国产半导体销售额提升至当前水平的五倍。此举旨在追赶全球竞争对手，并借势人工智能产业的蓬勃发展。【原文：Japan on Tuesday set a new target to boost sales of ​domestically produced semiconductors fivefold by 2040 under ‌Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi's growth investment strategy as it seeks to catch up with global rivals and ​tap the AI boom.】

item.title: 美国2月集装箱进口量下降6.5%，但仍创历史第四高位，Descartes公司称
item.description: 美国供应链技术服务商笛卡尔系统集团周二表示，2月份美国集装箱进口量同比下降6.5%，降至冬季假日购物季后的典型水平。【原文：U.S. container import volumes fell 6.5% in February from last year to levels typical for the post-winter ​holiday shopping season, supply chain technology provider Descartes Systems ‌Group said on Tuesday.】

item.title: 澳大利亚莱纳斯公司调整向日本供应稀土协议
item.description: 澳大利亚莱纳斯稀土公司已与日澳稀土公司重新修订供应协议，确保每年稳定供应5000吨钕-镨，这种关键稀土磁性材料是制造稀土磁铁的核心原料。【原文：Australia's Lynas Rare Earths has revamped its supply agreement with Japan Australia Rare Earths, ​securing a firm annual commitment for 5,000 tonnes of ‌neodymium‑praseodymium, a key rare‑earth magnet material.】

item.title: 欧洲股市因中东局势缓和预期而反弹
item.description: 欧洲股市周二反弹，因美国总统特朗普表示中东战争可能很快结束，提振了投资者情绪。【原文：European shares bounced back on Tuesday ‌as investor sentiment was lifted after U.S. President Donald Trump said the war in Middle East could come to a quick ​end.】

item.title: Lindt表示GLP-1使用者巧克力摄入量增加而非减少
item.description: 瑞士巧克力制造商连德（Lindt & Sprüngli）周二表示，美国GLP-1减肥药使用者中的巧克力销量增长速度快于其他人群。该公司援引的数据与预期相反——此前普遍认为减肥药会降低糖果需求。【原文：Chocolate sales are rising faster among U.S. users of ​GLP-1 weight-loss drugs than in the rest ‌of the population, Swiss chocolatier Lindt & Spruengli said on Tuesday, citing data that went against expectations the drugs ​would reduce confectionery demand.】

item.title: 乐高押注宝可梦与互动积木，贸易战恐推高成本
item.description: 乐高首席执行官表示，随着中东冲突导致油价和气价上涨，该公司正为能源和原材料成本上升做准备。这家丹麦玩具制造商正通过推出互动式"智能积木"和宝可梦联名产品来刺激增长。【原文：Lego is bracing for higher energy and ​raw material costs as oil and gas prices rise amid conflict in the Middle East, its ‌chief executive said, as the Danish toymaker looks to spur growth with interactive "smart bricks" and Pokemon tie-ups.】

item.title: 英国必胜客年度利润下滑15%
item.description: 英国必胜客集团周二公布年度利润下滑15%，这一年深受需求疲软、销售低迷和成本高企的困扰。【原文：Britain's Domino's Pizza Group on ​Tuesday posted a ‌15% fall in annual profit for ​a year ​plagued with muted demand, ⁠weak sales ​and high costs.】

item.title: 沙特阿美警告：若霍尔木兹海峡航运不恢复，石油行业将面临"灾难性后果"
item.description: 沙特阿拉伯国家石油公司（Aramco）周二表示，如果伊朗战争继续扰乱霍尔木兹海峡的航运，全球石油市场将面临"灾难性后果"。作为全球最大的石油出口商，该公司警告称，若伊朗冲突持续影响该海峡的运输，将对国际能源供应链造成严重冲击。【原文：Saudi Arabia's Aramco , the world's ‌top oil exporter, said on Tuesday that there would be "catastrophic consequences" for the world's oil markets if the Iran war continues to disrupt shipping in the Strait ​of Hormuz.】

item.title: 澳航因中东冲突导致燃油成本飙升而上调国际航线票价
item.description: 澳洲航空周二表示，鉴于中东冲突导致喷气燃料成本飙升，本周将上调国际航线票价。【原文：Qantas Airways said on Tuesday it would hike fares ​on its international routes this week in response ‌to the surge in jet fuel costs due to the conflict in the Middle East.】

item.title: 大众汽车利润减半，遭关税重创，中国市场战火纷飞
item.description: 大众汽车将面临又一个艰难之年，关税问题和重夺中国市场的竞争将成为主导因素。这家欧洲最大汽车制造商周二公布运营利润大幅下滑，并预测其不断萎缩的利润率仅会实现温和复苏。【原文：Volkswagen is in ‌for another tough year dominated by tariffs and the battle to win back China, after Europe's largest carmaker reported a slump in operating profit on Tuesday and forecast only a modest recovery for ​its dwindling margin.】

item.title: 空中出租车制造商Archer指控竞争对手Joby与中国存在非法联系
item.description: 电动空中出租车制造商Archer Aviation周一提起反诉，指控竞争对手Joby Aviation欺诈美国政府，并隐瞒其与中国之间的密切联系，以此获取不公平的竞争优势。【原文：Electric air-taxi ​maker Archer Aviation accused rival Joby Aviation in a countersuit filed ‌Monday of defrauding the U.S. government and hiding close ties to China that it used to gain an unfair competitive advantage.】

item.title: 德国初创企业计划建设30兆瓦人工智能数据中心，以增强主权控制力
item.description: 德国初创企业Polarise计划建造一座30兆瓦的人工智能数据中心，该项目将使德国本土运营的计算能力翻倍。此举正值欧洲各国加紧努力，以加强对关键技术基础设施的掌控。【原文：German start-up Polarise plans to build a new 30-megawatt artificial intelligence ​data centre that would double Germany's domestically-run computing capacity as European nations push ‌to gain more control over critical tech infrastructure.】

item.title: 雷诺计划到2030年实现销量增长23%，目标是通过海外扩张实现这一目标。
item.description: 雷诺宣布了一项五年战略，旨在保持在全球严峻市场中的竞争力。该公司表示，计划到2030年将雷诺品牌汽车的海外销量占比提升至半数，并实现销量增长超过五分之一。【原文：Renault plans to sell half of its Renault brand cars overseas by 2030 and grow volumes by ​over a fifth, it said as it unveiled a five-year strategy aimed at remaining ‌competitive in a tough global market.】

item.title: 晨间要闻：特朗普称战争已"非常彻底"——伊朗另有打算
item.description: 格雷戈尔·斯图尔特·亨特为您解析欧洲及全球市场今日展望：【原文：A look at the day ahead in European and global markets from Gregor Stuart Hunter:】

item.title: 焦点：欧洲货运卡车制造商严阵以待，应对中国低成本竞争对手的冲击浪潮
item.description: 今年，中国电动货卡正加速进军欧洲市场，沿着中国电动汽车开辟的道路前进，凭借更先进的技术和更低廉的价格，正威胁着颠覆欧洲市场格局。【原文：Chinese electric freight trucks are rolling into Europe at pace this year, following the trail blazed by Chinese EVs and threatening to upend the market with better technology and lower prices.】

item.title: 前Meta人工智能主管杨立昆的AMI公司为其另类人工智能方案筹集10.3亿美元
item.description: 由前Meta首席人工智能科学家杨立昆创立的初创公司Advanced Machine Intelligence周二宣布，已完成1.03亿美元融资，公司估值达35亿美元。该公司致力于将围绕推理、规划和"世界模型"构建的人工智能系统商业化。【原文：Advanced Machine Intelligence, the startup founded by former Meta Platforms chief AI scientist Yann LeCun, said on Tuesday ​it raised $1.03 billion based on a $3.50 billion pre-money valuation, as it ‌seeks to commercialize artificial intelligence systems built around reasoning, planning and "world models."】

item.title: 美国联邦航空管理局对所有捷蓝航空航班发布地面停飞令
item.description: 美国联邦航空管理局周二在一份通告中表示，捷蓝航空已要求对所有目的地实施地面停飞。【原文：JetBlue ​Airways has requested for ‌a ground stop at all destinations, ​the U.S Federal ​Aviation Administration said in ⁠an advisory on ​Tuesday.】
